relic_effects.description_zh: 敌人额外掉落[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Enemies drop [blue]{Gold}[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将一张随机[gold]稀有牌[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Rare Card[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将{StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold][gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|一张初始卡牌[gold]变化[/gold]为先古版本}
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card with an ancient version}.
relic_effects.note_zh: 将初始卡牌变化为先古版本
relic_effects.note_en: Transforms starter card into Ancient version

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌进行[gold]变化[/gold]，然后将这些牌[gold]升级[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}, then [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]迅捷[/purple][blue]3[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机[gold]虚无[/gold]牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random [gold]Ethereal[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] fewer {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add a [gold]Soot[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你往[gold]牌组[/gold]中增添卡牌时，都将额外添加一张相同的牌
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], add one additional copy.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: [gold]精英[/gold]敌人在被打败时多掉落一件遗物
relic_effects.description_en: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional Relic when defeated.
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
relic_effects.description_en: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, shuffle [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[red]执迷[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每个回合结束时，将随机一张[gold]被保留[/gold]的牌，直到被打出前耗能减少[blue]1[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: At the end of each turn, lower the cost of a random [gold]Retained[/gold] card by [blue]1[/blue] until played.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命
relic_effects.description_en: Every [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在[gold]精英[/gold]战的战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得一个独特的[red]诅咒[/red]和[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red] and [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你在每场战斗中第一次损失生命值时，抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，你可以从[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]撕咬[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into [gold]Maul[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在你的回合开始时，将一张随机[gold]攻击牌[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Attack[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得一张[red]贪婪[/red]，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, receive [red]Greed[/red]. Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 这件遗物已经从游戏中被移除
relic_effects.description_en: This relic is no longer in the game. It's just here for legacy purposes.
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，失去[red]9[/red]点最大生命值
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, lose [red]9[/red] Max HP. Add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你[gold]休息[/gold]时，可以添加一张牌到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], you may add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中每有[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，当你进入[gold]休息处[/gold]时就会回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命
relic_effects.description_en: For every {Cards:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} in your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每个回合开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. You may not draw cards during your turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命，然后随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你将一张带有[gold]格挡[/gold]的牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，为那张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]灵巧[/purple][blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you add a card that gains [gold]Block[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Nimble[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]灵魂[/gold]加入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Soul|Souls}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你打出能力牌时，抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you play a Power, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]锋利[/purple][blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} with [purple]Sharp[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当有一名敌人死亡时，获得{Energy:energyIcons()}并抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever an enemy dies, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每打出[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]张牌，就抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:card|cards}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，就抽[blue]1[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Every [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} you play, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机能力牌从你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]，这张牌可以免费打出
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]神化[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apotheosis[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每[gold]消耗[/gold][blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue]张牌，就抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Every [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]伶俐[/purple]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} with [purple]Adroit[/purple].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就获得[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就随机对一名敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in a single turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] random [gold]{Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时获得卡牌入组；拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup; Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 第一阶段的Boss敌人额外掉落[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: The Act 1 Boss drops [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从[blue]2[/blue]张无色牌中选择[blue]1张[/blue]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] Colorless cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张技能牌，就对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Skill|Skills} in a single turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]1[/blue]组卡牌奖励和[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机药水
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, gain [blue]1[/blue] card reward and procure [blue]1[/blue] random potion.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你将一张卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时获得可变金币（{Gold}）；拾起时获得卡牌入组
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold}); Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从[blue]3[/blue]张[gold]多人游戏无色牌[/gold]中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Colorless Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每攀爬一层楼层，就获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you climb a floor, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. No longer works when you spend any [gold]Gold[/gold] at the shop.
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你获得[gold]攻击牌[/gold]时，将其[gold]升级[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每打出一张能力牌，[gold]手牌[/gold]中就有一张随机牌在这个回合可以免费打出
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play that turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]涅奥之怒[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，[gold]变化[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机无色牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]组卡牌奖励
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card {Cards:plural:reward|rewards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在你的回合开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]2[/blue]张[gold]放松[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relax[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌移除
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. After each combat, randomly add [blue]1[/blue] back [gold]Upgraded[/gold].{CardTitles.StringValue:cond:
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你可以将你的卡牌奖励献祭给佩尔
relic_effects.description_en: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every {Sacrifices:plural:sacrifice|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrifices}, obtain a [gold]Relic[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物；通过献祭卡牌可额外获得遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup; Sacrificing cards grants extra relics

relic_effects.description_zh: 当你在本回合打出的牌少于等于[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]张时，则在你的下个回合开始时额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you play [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] or fewer {CardThreshold:plural:card|cards} during your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards} at the start of your next turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每[blue]{Turns}[/blue]个回合，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Every [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张耗能为0的卡牌从你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zero-cost cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，并受到[red]{Damage}[/red]点伤害
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and take [red]{Damage}[/red] damage.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每个回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
relic_effects.description_en: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Extinguishes at the start of [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]冷光[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminesce|Luminesces}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在你接下来的[blue]{Combats}[/blue]场战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of the next {Combats:plural:combat|[blue]{}[/blue] combats}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在战斗开始时的前[blue]{Turns}[/blue]个回合，你额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of your first {Turns:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，失去所有[gold]金币[/gold]，并从[blue]2[/blue]个卡牌包中选择[blue]1包[/blue]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, lose all [gold]Gold[/gold] and choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在你的回合开始时，花费[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]来获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of your turn, spend [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 查看[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张来自{Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|其他角色}的牌
relic_effects.description_en: See [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|another character}. Choose any number of them to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时获得卡牌入组；可选其他角色的卡牌入组
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup; May add cards from another character

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]{Curses}[/blue]张随机[red]诅咒[/red]牌和[blue]{Wishes}[/blue]张[purple]许愿[/purple]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Grants variable gold on pickup ({Gold})

relic_effects.description_zh: 你遇到的前[blue]{Cards}[/blue]组卡牌奖励将是被[gold]升级[/gold]过的
relic_effects.description_en: The first [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card rewards you see are [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. The first Treasure Chest you open is [red]empty[/red].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每回合多抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Start each combat [red]Confused[/red].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在[gold]Boss[/gold]战开始时，在本场战斗中随机[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of [gold]Boss[/gold] combats, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] for the rest of combat.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在击败[blue]{Elites}[/blue]名[gold]精英[/gold]敌人之后将变化为一件强力[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Transforms into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold] after defeating [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Elite|Elites}[/gold].
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]吹哨[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Whistle[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，从[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机无色牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，将{StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold]替换为[gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|你的初始[gold]遗物[/gold]替换为[gold]先古[/gold]版本}
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, replace {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] with [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|your starter [gold]Relic[/gold] with an [gold]Ancient[/gold] version}.
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物；将初始卡牌变化为先古版本
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup; Transforms starter card into Ancient version

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]蜡制遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Wax {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Every [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combat|combats}, your left-most [gold]Wax Relic[/gold] will melt away.
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌
relic_effects.description_en: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Instinct[/purple].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 你每打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张技能牌，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Skills, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
relic_effects.description_en: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} per turn.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机卡牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每当你击败一名[gold]精英[/gold]敌人的时候，随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Whenever you kill an [gold]Elite[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张技能牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:Skill|Skills}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 每组卡牌奖励中，都会有随机一张牌被[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]迅捷[/purple][blue]{SwiftAmount}[/blue]
relic_effects.description_en: A random card in each card reward is [gold]Enchanted[/gold] with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]{SwiftAmount}[/blue].
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 在[blue]{RemainingCombats}[/blue]场战斗后，获得随机[blue]{Repeat}[/blue]件[gold]遗物[/gold]
relic_effects.description_en: Receive [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] random [gold]{Repeat:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold] after [blue]{RemainingCombats}[/blue] {RemainingCombats:plural:combat|combats}.
relic_effects.note_zh: 拾起时额外授予蜡制遗物
relic_effects.note_en: Grants extra wax relic(s) on pickup

relic_effects.description_zh: 拾起时，[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
relic_effects.description_en: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relic_effects.note_en: Adds card(s) to deck on pickup

node_type_overrides.note_zh: 先古祭坛：多段遗物/变量 Gold 共存于同一节点；整段跳过非商店大额金币检测
node_type_overrides.note_en: Ancient altars host variable gold + multi-relic flows; skip NonShopLargeGold entirely

node_type_overrides.note_zh: 战斗节点 relic_choices 最多 1 次；PAELS_WING 献祭卡包换遗物时可达上限
node_type_overrides.note_en: Monster: max 1 relic pick; PAELS_WING card-sacrifice-to-relic is the only known legit case

node_type_overrides.note_zh: 藏宝图节点 relic_choices 通常 1 次
审判事件（mpt=unknown）：可从多轮试炼中选多件遗物；实测最多 3 件
node_type_overrides.note_en: The Trial (mpt=unknown): multiple rounds of trial can grant multiple relics; observed max=3

node_type_overrides.note_zh: mpt=monster 但 room_type=ancient：先古祭坛语义；如 EVENT.TOADPOLES 所在的 ancient 语义节点
node_type_overrides.note_en: mpt=monster with room_type=ancient: Ancient altar semantics; e.g. EVENT.TOADPOLES node

node_type_overrides.note_zh: Boss 节点实测：4 玩家存档中多人可各拿 1 件遗物（ceil=2 以内）
node_type_overrides.note_en: Boss nodes: 4-player runs may have each player pick 1 relic (within ceil=2)
